channel.title: Region-Agnostic on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Region-Agnostic on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Region-agnostic reservations for Global PTU in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry now offers generally available region-agnostic reservations for Global Provisioned Throughput Units (PTUs). Customers can reserve PTU capacity once and use it from any supported region instead of being tied to a single region.

  • Source: Azure Updates
